metadata.title: Generate a lovable_build_prompt for compliance_evidence using the sovereign_lens, enabling enterprise compliance leads in Latin America to produce governed artifacts with explicit validation gates, despite high-urgency, low-context, and chaotic input.

mission.primary_objective: Generate a lovable_build_prompt for compliance_evidence using the sovereign_lens, enabling enterprise compliance leads in Latin America to produce governed artifacts with explicit validation gates, despite high-urgency, low-context, and chaotic input.
mission.success_definition: The generated prompt produces an artifact with all five SR8 sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.; Artifact includes at least three explicit validation gates (e.g., completeness check, regulatory check, sovereign check).; Artifact is usable by a compliance lead in Latin America with minimal additional context.; Artifact compiles without error into an SR8 directive.

in_scope.item: The prompt must accept messy, partial, urgent, and ambiguous compliance evidence inputs from Latin American enterprise contexts, and output a structured, SR8-compilable artifact with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections. It must include explicit validation gates for completeness, regulatory alignment, and sovereign compliance.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: The generated prompt produces an artifact with all five SR8 sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Artifact includes at least three explicit validation gates (e.g., completeness check, regulatory check, sovereign check).

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Artifact is usable by a compliance lead in Latin America with minimal additional context.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Artifact compiles without error into an SR8 directive.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.app_goal: Generate a lovable_build_prompt for compliance_evidence using the sovereign_lens, enabling enterprise compliance leads in Latin America to produce governed artifacts with explicit validation gates, despite high-urgency, low-context, and chaotic input.

user_flows.item: The prompt must accept messy, partial, urgent, and ambiguous compliance evidence inputs from Latin American enterprise contexts, and output a structured, SR8-compilable artifact with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections. It must include explicit validation gates for completeness, regulatory alignment, and sovereign compliance.

build_steps.item: The prompt must accept messy, partial, urgent, and ambiguous compliance evidence inputs from Latin American enterprise contexts, and output a structured, SR8-compilable artifact with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections. It must include explicit validation gates for completeness, regulatory alignment, and sovereign compliance.

acceptance_criteria.item: The generated prompt produces an artifact with all five SR8 sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.
Artifact includes at least three explicit validation gates (e.g., completeness check, regulatory check, sovereign check).
Artifact is usable by a compliance lead in Latin America with minimal additional context.
Artifact compiles without error into an SR8 directive.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
